paper_metadata.title: A Generalist Agent
paper_metadata.abstract: Inspired by progress in large-scale language modeling, we apply a similar approach towards building a single generalist agent beyond the realm of text outputs. The agent, which we refer to as Gato, works as a multi-modal, multi-task, multi-embodiment generalist policy. The same network with the same weights can play Atari, caption images, chat, stack blocks with a real robot arm and much more, deciding based on its context whether to output text, joint torques, button presses, or other tokens. In this report we describe the model and the data, and document the current capabilities of Gato.

extraction_data.innovation: A generalist agent trained on a diverse multimodal dataset (text, vision, control tasks) using a single model with a single set of weights, achieving strong performance across multiple domains without task-specific fine-tuning.
extraction_data.pretraining_corpus: 604 distinct tasks with varying modalities (text, images, proprioception, discrete actions, continuous actions)
extraction_data.optimizer: Adam (as per Section E for fine-tuning)
extraction_data.extension: The model uses a single model architecture (encoder-decoder) trained on multimodal data, enabling zero-shot performance across multiple tasks.
extraction_data.research_problem: Generalist learning across multiple tasks and modalities without task-specific training.
extraction_data.application: Multi-modal tasks including text, image captioning, robotics, Atari games, and more.

extraction_data.innovation: A version of Gato with 3.1 billion parameters, trained on a diverse corpus to enable generalist learning across text, image, and robotics tasks without task-specific fine-tuning.
extraction_data.pretraining_task: Causal language modeling, image-based tasks, and robotics tasks
extraction_data.pretraining_corpus: Combined datasets including text (e.g., WebText), image-based tasks (e.g., Procgen, Meta-World), and robotics tasks (e.g., DM Control Suite, MuJoCo-based tasks)
extraction_data.extension: The model uses a unified architecture with image tokenization and attention mechanisms tailored for both text and image inputs, enabling few-shot learning across diverse domains.
extraction_data.research_problem: Generalist learning across multiple tasks and domains without task-specific fine-tuning.
extraction_data.application: Generalist tasks including text-based tasks, image-based tasks, and robotics tasks.
